channel.title: Cosmic Rays on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in Cosmic Rays on Kayra Sari

item.title: CommunicaTED: Communication On A Vertical Axis Using Cosmic Ray Muons
item.description: This paper proposes a novel telecommunication system that uses cosmic ray muons for wireless data transmission through solid obstructions. Presented at CERN Beamline for Schools Competition, 2025.
